author: potuz
content: I don't want an alternative btw, I just like to remove the extra VC work

author: raulvk
content: haha, still, i want to make sure we explore more ideas and explicitly discard them

author: raulvk
content: aggregator-based solution are promising, but on surface leakier on the consensus, slashing, and networking fronts IMO. maybe we can all share some end shapes we're imagining, and walk backwards? e.g.:

author: raulvk
content: - cross-committee aggregates could skip the subnets and be submitted directly to the global topic. this could enable optimal packing efficiency for operators (they could send a single message for all their atts no matter what committees they were scheduled on). maybe the protocol can support the notion of "static aggregators". might synergize with rainbow staking and be useful for PQ sigs down the road

author: raulvk
content: ˆ^ a priori sounds complex and definitely not feasible for Hegotá, maybe worthwhile to continue exploring for future forks
